channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Railway employee honoured posthumously after foiling suicide attack in Attock
item.description: In a deeply moving incident from Attock district, Muhammad Liaqat Ali, a railway employee, sacrificed his life while preventing a suspected suicide attack near a police checkpost in Jand tehsil, close...

item.title: Short-Term Diet Adjustments May Reduce Biological Age in Older Adults
item.description: A recent study from the University of Sydney suggests that short-term dietary changes can influence biological aging in adults aged 65 to 75. In a four-week trial involving 104 participants, researche...

item.title: ACT Government welcomes federal budget with key infrastructure and community funding
item.description: The ACT Government has welcomed the 2026-27 federal budget as a positive shift towards fairer treatment of Canberra, despite limited new funding for major projects. Chief Minister Andrew Barr and Trea...

item.title: Nyakanazi Power Expansion Project Progress at 49 Percent Causes Concern for Energy Ministry
item.description: The Nyakanazi Power expansion project, aimed at increasing electricity supply in Tanzania, has reached only 49 percent completion, causing concern for the Ministry of Energy. The project, which is cru...

item.title: Senator Bato dela Rosa Returns to Senate After Months Away Due to ICC Warrant
item.description: Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa recently returned to the Philippine Senate after a six-month absence, citing personal shame and pressing legislative duties as reasons for his comeback. His absence beg...

item.title: James Comer avoids answering questions about Trump's statements on Americans' financial concerns
item.description: House Oversight Committee Chairman James Comer (R-KY) faced reporters regarding President Donald Trump's recent comments about the rising cost-of-living crisis. When asked by Meidas Touch reporter Pab...

item.title: Dela Rosa's Lawyers Prepare Legal Action Against NBI Agents Over Arrest Attempt
item.description: The legal team representing former PNP Chief Ronald 'Bato' Dela Rosa is preparing to file complaints against certain National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) agents involved in a widely circulated arres...

item.title: Limpopo Police Hunt Suspect After Correctional Officer Fatally Shot in Modimolle
item.description: In a tragic incident in Modimolle, Limpopo, a female correctional officer was shot and killed on Tuesday morning while walking to work along Nelson Mandela Road. Police spokesperson Col Malesela Ledwa...

item.title: Israel Qualifies for Eurovision Final Amid Audience Protests and Sound Difficulties; Boy George Exits
item.description: The Eurovision Song Contest returned on 12 May 2026 in Vienna with the first live semi-final, featuring 15 performers competing for a place in Saturday's grand finale. Israeli singer Noam Bettan quali...

item.title: Texas man uncovers possible serial killer after decades-long investigation into daughter’s disappearance
item.description: Tim Miller, a Texan whose teenage daughter Laura disappeared in 1984 and was later found murdered, spent decades trying to find her killer. Frustrated by what he considered inadequate police investiga...

item.title: Makongoro Nyerere selected as winner of CRDB Bank’s World Cup trip campaign
item.description: Makongoro Nyerere, one of Tanzania's notable public figures, has been announced as the winner of CRDB Bank's promotional campaign offering a trip to the FIFA World Cup. The campaign, which attracted m...

item.title: Southampton secure play-off final spot after dramatic extra-time win over Middlesbrough amid spygate controversy
item.description: Southampton booked their place in the Championship play-off final with a dramatic 2-1 extra-time victory against Middlesbrough at St Mary’s Stadium. The match, which ended with Shea Charles scoring a ...

item.title: IMD launches AI-based monsoon forecast system and predicts rains in Andamans
item.description: The India Meteorological Department (IMD) on Tuesday unveiled two innovative weather services aimed at providing more precise and localised forecasts. The first is an AI-enabled monsoon advance foreca...

item.title: SHA expands free maternity services and cancer treatment under Universal Health Coverage
item.description: The Social Health Authority (SHA) has rolled out expanded health benefit packages aimed at strengthening Universal Health Coverage (UHC) in Kenya. This move comes after directives from President Willi...

item.title: Internal battles and contested primaries ahead of APC governors’ second term bids
item.description: As APC dey prepare for 2027 elections, indications show say no be every sitting governor go easily collect ticket for second term. While some governors fit run unopposed, like Umo Bassey Eno (Akwa Ibo...

item.title: Rhun ap Iorwerth sworn in as Wales' first non-Labour first minister
item.description: Rhun ap Iorwerth has been confirmed as the first minister of Wales, marking a historic shift as Plaid Cymru becomes the first non-Labour party to lead the Welsh government. Elected by a roll call of p...

item.title: Thieves Steal Car Grille During Traffic Jam in Nairobi, Raising Safety Concerns
item.description: Nairobi motorists are on edge after a daylight theft involving a United Nations-plated Toyota Harrier along Parklands Road. Dashcam footage shows three young men removing the car’s front grille in sec...

item.title: FDA Commissioner Marty Makary Steps Down Following Agency Restructuring
item.description: Marty Makary, the Commissioner of the U.S. Food and Drug Administration, has resigned after a period of internal turmoil within the agency. His departure comes after White House staff approved a plan ...

item.title: Rep. Virginia Foxx responds to fourth grader’s question on electric vehicle rebates with concerns over national debt
item.description: U.S. Representative Virginia Foxx (R-NC), a member of the MAGA wing of the Republican Party, recently responded to a letter from a 10-year-old student asking about a $5,000 tax rebate for purchasing e...

item.title: Blue Bombers Sign Defensive End Nuer Gatkuoth Following CFL Draft
item.description: The Winnipeg Blue Bombers have officially signed their first-round draft pick, defensive end Nuer Gatkuoth. The 24-year-old Edmonton native was the fourth overall selection in last month’s CFL Canadia...
